rulings.Case Title: WILLIAM H BRADLEY VS. DOLMEN PROPERTY GROUP LLC A DELAWARE LIMITED ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion For Leave To File Amendment To His Fourth Amended Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Motion Calendar for Monday, June 27, 2016, Line 1. PLAINTIFF WILLIAM BRADLEY Notice Of Motion For Leave To File Amendment To His Fourth Amended Complaint is continued to June 30, 2016 on Court's own motion. Defendant Dolmen Property Group, LLC's unauthorized sur-reply is stricken. =(501/REQ)
